arts.ttl: Geovany Quenda transfer update as Chelsea's 'reason' behind £40m deal emerges
arts.sum: Chelsea have also included the option of a further 12 months being added into the deal for Quenda, who will link up with the Blues squad at the end of next season. The report states that the Portuguese club demanded that Quenda remain with their squad until the end of next season before officially completing a switch to Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams release clause, Arsenal transfer truth and 'I'll never' vow
arts.sum: Nico Williams continues to be one of the star-studded names linked with a move to Arsenal in the summer transfer window. football.london reported back in January that Arsenal remain keen on the player in 2025.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's return plan for Bukayo Saka with Real Madrid fixture targeted
arts.sum: Arsenal face Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter-finals next month and Mikel Arteta hopes to have Bukayo Saka, who's been out injured since December, available once again
